channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Four major potholes coming down leckhampton Road before morend Road. Getting worse each day. On top of an old bad repair which you allowed., 4th March
item.description:
Leckhampton Road coming down before the turn to morend Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 105, Leckhampton Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 4th March
item.description:
Cway pothole around BT cover 500mm x 300mm x 54mm STAT PLAN REQUIRED 2 way traffic lights TM required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 4th March
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole 900x600x40mm plus x2 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gate is damaged/missing/locked problem, 4th March
item.description:
Caller reports this long term PROW path has now had part of the first style blocked up. Caller reports they have been using for 45 years. The first style has now been blocked where pets could access, caller reports they are unable to get dogs through now. Before the new galvanised gates that were put up recently.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 4th March
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole 1200x600x40mm (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 4th March
item.description:
Cway pothole 1000mm x 500mm x 45mm STAT PLAN REQUIRED NSD x 1 Stop and go TM required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 4th March
item.description:
Customer believes there has been a repair this morning that isn't going to last.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 4th March
item.description:
Pothole in the road
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 4th March
item.description:
Customer is having a driveway put in outside his house, but they are having issues with a tree on the public path. The branches are in the way/falling down and the workers said they can't touch it.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin at childrens play area overfliwing with poo bags, 4th March
item.description:
Bin at childrens play area overfliwing with poo bags. The nearest dog waste bin is only 100 yards away but none walks past it so they use the litter bin. Perhaps consider moving the dog waste bin or put signage on the lutter bin, directing dog owners to the waste bin. I look forward to your response.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bishops Cleeve FP2, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 foot by 3 foot pothole on Church Road, 4th March
item.description:
Very large pothole now on Church road just before intersection with Meadowsweet Road. Size and location makes almost impossible to avoid.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leckhampton Lane, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 4th March
item.description:
2 HOUR GIVE AND TAKE 15 MINUTES DELAY BOARDS FOOTWAY POTHOLE 1700X450X75MM MAKE SAFE (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped dog crate, 4th March
item.description:
Corner of swallow crescent and rookery road what looks like a dog crate, sharp edges and dangerously positioned

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swallow Crescent, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 4th March
item.description:
PERM REPAIR JOB 73118313: Pothole
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large deep pot hole outside 17 Greenhills Road Cheltenham, 4th March
item.description:
Large deep pothole outside 17 Greenhills Road has just caused damage to my wheel and tyre!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Greenhills Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 4th March
item.description:
Cway pothole 15DB 2000mm x 1200mm x 48mm STAT PLAN REQUIRED Temporary road closure TM required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extremely poor "repair", issue is as bad if not now actually worse than it was before, to the point we now have to drive into oncoming traffic to avoid damage to cars issue is ongoing now for a considerable period of time, 4th March
item.description:
Just before speed / width restriction before asda
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 4th March
